name: Vessel Drift Case
summary: The Vessel Drift Case is a rugged, purpose-built carry case designed to keep your customers’ Vessel flower accessories organised and protected.
description: The Vessel Drift Case is a rugged, purpose-built carry case designed to keep your customers’ Vessel flower accessories organised and protected. Featuring a durable, water-resistant exterior and smart internal storage, this case delivers reliable everyday portability for Vessel Air, Helix chillums, Basin jars, Carbon lighters, and more. The Drift Case is built with a tough, water-resistant ultra-touch exterior and a concealed zipper to help minimise odour escape. Inside, elastic retention bands securely hold each accessory in place, while an integrated pouch keeps smaller tools neatly stored. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
